purpose: Architecture overview of the embedded Code Explorer: workspace-dashboard bridge, multi-workspace tab system, Monaco editor integration, file-system service, search service, and debug system using Node CDP. Explains how IDE state coexists with dashboard/git state in the shared AppContext.
gotchas: Workspace folder is independent of dashboard project_root — they may diverge
Debug sessions piggyback on the dashboard worker process when applicable
patterns: Workspace bridge syncs IDE folder with active dashboard project
Monaco-based editor with custom worker config
CDP debugger over websocket inside main process
conventions: src/ui/components/ide/ for components, electron/services/DebugService.js for debug runtime
